zh.lifeSummary: 當Joane Brobarne於1544年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾洛德波洛時，她的父親Christopher Brobarne29歲，母親Katheryn Barker24歲。她於1562年與Henry Hullings在英國格盧斯特斯爾洛德波洛結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1613年10月2日在她的家鄉享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾洛德波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joane Brobarne于1544年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾洛德波洛时，她的父亲Christopher Brobarne29岁，母亲Katheryn Barker24岁。她于1562年与Henry Hullings在英国格盧斯特斯爾洛德波洛结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1613年10月2日在她的家乡享年69岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾洛德波洛。

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jean
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

en.lifeSummary: When Joane Brobarne was born in 1544, in Rodborough, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Christopher Brobarne, was 29 and her mother, Katheryn Barker, was 24. She married Henry Hullings in 1562, in Rodborough, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 2 October 1613, in her hometown, at the age of 69, and was buried in Rodborough, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Westbury on Severn, Gloucestershire, Eng: Westbury on Severn, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joane Brobarne est née en 1544, à Rodborough, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Christopher Brobarne, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Katheryn Barker, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Hullings en 1562, à Rodborough, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 octobre 1613, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Rodborough, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Westbury on Severn, Gloucestershire, Eng: Westbury on Severn, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Joane Brobarne 1544 in Rodborough, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Christopher Brobarne 29 und ihre Mutter Katheryn Barker 24. Sie hat 1562 in Rodborough, Gloucestershire, England Henry Hullings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. Oktober 1613 im Alter von 69 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Rodborough, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joane Brobarne è nata il nel 1544 nel Rodborough, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Christopher Brobarne, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Katheryn Barker, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Henry Hullings nel 1562, nel Rodborough, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 2 ottobre 1613, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Rodborough, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joane Brobarneが1544年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアロドボロウで生まれた時，父Christopher Brobarneは29歳，母Katheryn Barkerは24歳であった。1562年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアロドボロウでHenry Hullingsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1613年10月2日に故郷で69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアロドボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joane Brobarne(이)가 1544년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 로드버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Christopher Brobarne(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katheryn Barker(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1562년 영국 그루스스터실르 로드버루그h에서 Henry Hullings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1613년 10월 2일 그녀의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 로드버루그h에 묻혔다.

pt.Westbury on Severn, Gloucestershire, Eng: Westbury on Severn, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joane Brobarne nasceu em 1544, em Rodborough, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Christopher Brobarne, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Katheryn Barker, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Hullings em 1562, em Rodborough, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 2 de outubro de 1613, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Rodborough, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Westbury on Severn, Gloucestershire, Eng: вестбури он сивирн, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joane Brobarne родилась в 1544 г. в местности родбороую, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Christopher Brobarne было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Katheryn Barker, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Hullings в 1562 г. в местности родбороую, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 2 октября 1613 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности родбороую, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joane Brobarne nació en 1544, en Rodborough, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Christopher Brobarne, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Katheryn Barker, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Henry Hullings en 1562, en Rodborough, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 2 de octubre de 1613, en su pueblo, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Rodborough, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
